---
title: "Conference Table Tents"
format:
  typst:
    keep-typ: true
    papersize: us-letter
    margin:
      x: 0pt
      y: 0pt
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
#| label: read-attendees
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(tidyr)

# Same CSV as the badges — only the `First`, `Last`, and `Affil2` columns
# are used here.
attendees <- read_csv("attendees.csv", show_col_types = FALSE) |>
  mutate(across(everything(), \(x) replace_na(x, ""))) |>
  mutate(name = str_trim(paste(First, Last)))
```

```{r}
#| label: emit-typst
#| results: asis

ty_escape <- function(x) {
  x |>
    str_replace_all(fixed("\\"), "\\\\") |>
    str_replace_all(fixed("\""), "\\\"")
}

cat('```{=typst}\n')
cat('#import "nametent.typ": nametent\n')
cat('```\n\n')

for (i in seq_len(nrow(attendees))) {
  a <- attendees[i, ]
  cat('```{=typst}\n')
  cat(sprintf(
    '#nametent(\n  name: "%s",\n  affiliation: "%s",\n)\n',
    ty_escape(a$name),
    ty_escape(a$Affil2)
  ))
  cat('```\n\n')
}
```
